expectations.text: Detects branch protection on target
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: correctly found no classic protection on main (404 API). CLAUDE.md-documented 2-review org ruleset is invisible via API — mismatch not detected.

expectations.text: Validates required status checks exist
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: correctly found no required checks on main (only beta ruleset has checks). Accurate result, but org-level enforcement gap undetected.

expectations.text: Warns about bootstrap deadlock if checks missing
expectations.evidence: Correctly NOT triggered — no required checks on main means no deadlock scenario. Skill correctly skipped this warning.

expectations.text: Suggests alternative target if needed
expectations.evidence: FAIL: skill only scans local .github/workflows/ — org-level branch-protection.yml (ConductionNL/.github) forbids feature/*→main but is invisible to the scan. No alternative target suggested.

expectations.text: Runs gh pr list --state merged to detect title convention
expectations.evidence: Skill's Step 6 explicitly requires this command; ran it and found 10 merged PRs all following type(scope): description pattern.

expectations.text: Drafts title with Conventional Commits prefix (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:)
expectations.evidence: Drafted 'docs(skills): add review-pr skill + promote learnings across skill library' — correct type(scope): format matching detected convention.

expectations.text: Does NOT draft a title with no prefix
expectations.evidence: Step 6 pre-draft checklist + learnings.md + two 'Mistakes to Avoid' entries all enforce prefix requirement.

expectations.text: Test plan uses plain bullets, never - [ ] checkboxes
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 6 template uses plain '- ' bullets. Learnings.md reinforces this in three separate places.

expectations.text: Computes how many commits target is ahead of source
expectations.evidence: Used git rev-list HEAD..origin/{TARGET_BRANCH} --count; found AHEAD=8 (development 8 commits ahead of source).

expectations.text: Warns prominently when target is >20 commits ahead
expectations.evidence: Threshold correctly defined at >20. AHEAD=8 so warning not triggered this run — but threshold verified to exist and would fire at 21+.

expectations.text: Offers merge/rebase/continue-anyway options
expectations.evidence: Three options hardcoded in skill; would be offered when threshold breached. Not triggered this run (AHEAD=8 < 20).

expectations.text: Does NOT silently proceed to PR draft with a bloated diff
expectations.evidence: Explicit stop-and-ask guard exists before continuing when threshold breached. Correctly not triggered at AHEAD=8.

expectations.text: Runs composer check:strict for PHP apps
expectations.evidence: N/A correctly handled: no PHP files or composer.json in hydra. Skill skipped via Step 4a workflow inspection.

expectations.text: Runs npm lint for frontend
expectations.evidence: N/A correctly handled: no package.json or JS/TS source. Skill skipped correctly.

expectations.text: Reports failures before creating PR
expectations.evidence: Step 4f: ShellCheck found 7 real errors (SC2168, SC1125 in orchestrate.sh, hydra-supervisor.sh, cron-spec-from-issue.sh, hydra-label.sh). All surfaced with file+line+rule before PR creation.

expectations.text: Suggests fixes
expectations.evidence: Step 4f offers 'Fix issues first, then re-run' as first option. Errors are actionable: move local declarations inside functions (SC2168), fix em-dash in shellcheck directives (SC1125).

expectations.text: Does NOT create PR with failing checks
expectations.evidence: Hard-stop at Step 4f requires explicit user input; no auto-proceed path on failures. PR body would include ⚠️ warning if user explicitly overrides.

expectations.text: Detects current repo and branch
expectations.evidence: Step 0/1: detected ConductionNL/hydra and feature/skill-improvement correctly.

expectations.text: Recommends target branch (feature→dev, dev→beta, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Step 3: recommended 'development' — the only valid target for a feature/* branch per branching strategy table.

expectations.text: Runs local quality checks if applicable
expectations.evidence: Step 4 reached; CI workflows identified (ShellCheck, hydra-review); interactive prompt skipped in eval mode as expected.

expectations.text: Creates PR via gh CLI with proper format (or detects existing PR)
expectations.evidence: Step 3.5: PR #184 detected via gh pr list; offered view/update/create-duplicate options; no duplicate created.

expectations.text: Detects branch protection on target
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: called the API endpoint, got 404 (correct result), but no systematic fallback to check rulesets or org-level rules without skill guidance.

expectations.text: Validates required status checks exist
expectations.evidence: No cross-referencing of required checks against actual CI workflows in .github/workflows/.

expectations.text: Warns about bootstrap deadlock if checks missing
expectations.evidence: No awareness of the deadlock scenario — not attempted without skill.

expectations.text: Suggests alternative target if needed
expectations.evidence: No logic to surface the development convention from CLAUDE.md or warn that feature/*→main bypasses standard flow.

expectations.text: Runs gh pr list --state merged to detect title convention
expectations.evidence: Did not run this command. Inferred convention from branch commit messages instead — different data source, less reliable.

expectations.text: Drafts title with Conventional Commits prefix (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:)
expectations.evidence: Drafted 'docs(skills): improve skill library with review-pr, learnings promotion, and eval updates' — correct prefix inferred from commit history.

expectations.text: Does NOT draft a title with no prefix
expectations.evidence: Prefix present in drafted title.

expectations.text: Test plan uses plain bullets, never - [ ] checkboxes
expectations.evidence: N/A for this title-only task; no test plan drafted.

expectations.text: Computes how many commits target is ahead of source
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: ran the divergence check and got the number, but did not surface it structurally in the output.

expectations.text: Warns prominently when target is >20 commits ahead
expectations.evidence: Baseline treats divergence as informational, not a gate. Would mention in passing but not block or present structured options.

expectations.text: Offers merge/rebase/continue-anyway options
expectations.evidence: No structured choice presented — baseline would proceed directly to PR draft.

expectations.text: Does NOT silently proceed to PR draft with a bloated diff
expectations.evidence: Baseline would silently proceed regardless of divergence count.

expectations.text: Runs composer check:strict for PHP apps
expectations.evidence: N/A: no PHP. Baseline correctly skipped.

expectations.text: Runs npm lint for frontend
expectations.evidence: N/A: no package.json. Baseline correctly skipped.

expectations.text: Reports failures before creating PR
expectations.evidence: Surfaced manifests/network-policy.yaml multi-document YAML issue before any PR action.

expectations.text: Suggests fixes
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: explained the YAML issue but gave no concrete fix command. Weak compared to skill's Step 4f which provides actionable remediation.

expectations.text: Does NOT create PR with failing checks
expectations.evidence: No PR created; would ask user to confirm before proceeding.

expectations.text: Detects current repo and branch
expectations.evidence: Ran git branch + gh repo view; identified ConductionNL/hydra and feature/skill-improvement.

expectations.text: Recommends target branch (feature→dev, dev→beta, etc.)
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: detected existing PR targets development (correct) but did not independently derive the recommendation — relied on the existing PR's base.

expectations.text: Runs local quality checks if applicable
expectations.evidence: N/A for docs-only changes; baseline correctly skipped checks.

expectations.text: Creates PR via gh CLI with proper format (or detects existing PR)
expectations.evidence: PR #184 detected via gh pr list --head; no duplicate created.
